2_primaryJTBD.decision: What is the most important training decision/action I should take now to improve performance this week?

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: EXCELLENT - Strong decision focus (57% decision elements)
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: Yes - Single dominant CTA in hero card

4_visualHierarchy.assessment: EXCELLENT - Intentional 3-layer architecture (30% decision, 40% control, 30% operations)

kpis.note: Decision-oriented, tells user what to do now
At-risk goals surfaced first with recommended actions
Shows training load vs readiness with implications

5_kpiQuality.assessment: EXCELLENT - All metrics are actionable leading indicators

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: EXCELLENT - Primary action visible inline, 1 click to execute

8_stateCoverage.assessment: EXCELLENT - Comprehensive state handling with custom skeletons and error recovery
gaps: No explicit empty state for new users with no goals (may be handled by hero card)
No success state after completing action

9_roleScalability.recommendation: Well-designed for scale with intentional progressive disclosure (3-layer model)

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Best-in-class decision dashboard with McKinsey-grade architecture

topIssues.issue: Missing success state after user completes action
Unclear if empty state exists for new users
No visible documentation of decision logic
topIssues.impact: Users may not understand why this action was prioritized

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Add celebration/success modal after completing hero action + explainer tooltip for decision logic

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader + PageContainer pattern (consistent). Unique 3-layer architecture clearly documented in code comments. This is a model page for decision-first design.

stateHandling.error: Comprehensive ErrorState component with retry + non-blocking error banner

architecture.note: Intentional information architecture documented in code comments

overallAssessment: EXCELLENT - Gold standard decision-first dashboard with clear architecture and comprehensive state handling
